job_title: Software Development Engineer, Devices Software & Services
job_nlp_title: Software Development Engineer, Devices Software & Services
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Frontend Software Engineer
core_skills: Software Programming, Software Development Life Cycle, Coding Standards, Software Architecture, Code Reviews
skill_match_scores: Software Programming:0.5, Software Development Life Cycle:1.0, Coding Standards:1.0, Software Architecture:0.0, Code Reviews:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree or equivalent, Experience programming with at least one software programming language, 3+ years of non-internship professional software development experience
preferred_quals: Knowledge of professional software engineering & best practices for full software development life cycle, including coding standards, software architectures, code reviews, source control management, continuous deployments, testing, and operational excellence, Familiarity with Agentic Software Development using industry standard tools (Kiro, Claude, Cursor etc.)
core_responsibilities: Invent New Paradigms: Move beyond traditional voice UI to build "Ambient Intelligence" experiences that span Alexa, Fire TV, and mobile/wearable surfaces, focusing on proactive assistance rather than reactive commands, Agentic Engineering: Revolutionize the way we ship code by integrating LLM-based coding agents and autonomous development workflows to achieve unprecedented engineering velocity, Redefine "The Assistant": Build the logic that allows Alexa to handle multi-turn, complex reasoning tasks - like planning a week of calorie-specific meals or autonomously booking a repair service through third-party integrations, Rapid Innovation: Operate in a fast-paced environment where you will prototype, test, and deploy features that leverage multimodal inputs (camera, audio, and documents) to create personalized customer magic, Cross-Surface Continuity: Ensure that a customer’s experience is persistent and context-aware beyond the device boundaries - whether they are at their desk using Alexa.com, in their living room with Fire TV, or on the go with a wearable
job_summary: Amazon is looking for a talented Software Development Engineer to join their Devices Software & Services team. The role involves building innovative customer experiences using the latest software development tools and redefining the software engineering lifecycle to create seamless interactions across devices.
